events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock's Enduring Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, kicking off with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years ago today, Oasis changed the game with 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your standout track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. Which iconic performance defines the festival for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. Elvis Presley's music continues to define generations. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix in 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix today. His influence on music is timeless. What's your go-to Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs! Which track is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders anthem?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune from the Burnage legend?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was originally released in 1971, though it saw a UK re-release in 1975.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: Imagine all the people... living life in peace. John Lennon's 'Imagine' continues to inspire. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: The first Apple iPod unveiled (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the revolutionary first-generation iPod on this day in 2001, changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when you could fit 1,000 songs in your pocket? The first Apple iPod was unveiled 25 years ago today. What was your first MP3 player?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Calling
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your favourite thing about 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon. What's your favourite song or memory of him?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite Monty Python sketch or Fawlty Towers moment?
